summary: Plan-only inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are permitted by this job. #93198, #92873, and #93239 are focused open PRs that should stay in their own review lanes, but none has complete merge preflight because mergeability is unknown and the artifact does not prove a passed Codex /review merge gate. #93249 needs maintainer re-review because the author materially rewrote the Telegram fix after the stale bot review and the PR remains broad/message-delivery sensitive. #93262 is a small repairable contributor PR with a concrete branch-repair path before any merge recommendation.
